title: 晴れの日、ヒラヒラ、花束を

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around town, I bump into Rice
Shower and her friends, and we strike up a
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We're on our way to buy some stuff we need to
make preserved flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The flowers are blooming so beautifully right
now, I can't wait to preserve them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Look over there! There's a whole group of
pretty people!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're right. They all look so fancy in their
kimonos and dresses... Maybe it's a wedding?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A wedding! Aww, I'd love to see the ceremony!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And how do you celebrate the joy of the married
couple? With a shower of rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Oh, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Wedding Hall Staff
text_block_list.text: What?! The bouquet's not coming?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hear the panicked voices of the wedding hall
staff. It sounds like there's been a problem with
the bouquet delivery, and they can't organize a
replacement.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You can't have a wedding without any flowers...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's all my fault... My presence has ruined
the wedding!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, flowers, huh? They're gonna need a whole
lot of them, right?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's a bouquet, so they'd need quite a lot. I
don't know how you could find so many in such a
short amount of time, though.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I can get the flowers they need!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Rice! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, e-excuse me! Please take these flowers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower hands the staff member at the
wedding hall a huge armful of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Rice, were those flowers...
choice_data_list:
Weren't those the flowers you were going to
preserve?

Weren't those the flowers you were going to
preserve?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! Please take them! I don't like the idea of
a wedding being cursed with bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would make me happier than my flowers
bringing joy to others!

text_block_list.name: Wedding Hall Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so very much... Now we can hold the
wedding as planned!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and the others are invited to the
wedding as a token of gratitude for saving the
day, and it goes off without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It's time for the bouquet toss!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh gosh! I'm getting all nervous now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The joy-filled bouquet is tossed, and as it soars
through the air...

text_block_list.name: Crow
text_block_list.text: Caw, caw! CHOMP!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! A crow caught the bouquet!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should we do?! It's my fault for being
here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep, this one's on you, Rice! Look up at the sky!
It's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flowers rain from the sky. With the bouquet
loosening in the crow's mouth, the petals shower
down...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A petal shower... This is so perfect for a day like
today.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! Happiness for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I managed to put a smile on
everyone's faces in the end!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I really, truly hope everyone finds lasting
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...And so the joyous flowers continue to bring
smiles to all. A happy ending indeed.
